creator: dhiru.kholia@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

FreeBSD 7 installation bails out saying "No Disks found!".
( And the emergency shell is plainly unusable!).

I also tried booting dbsd 2.0 (#freebsd suggestion) but it too crashed.

My system details:

C2D 6750
XFX Nforce 650i Ultra BIOS Rev. 03
2GB DDR2 800

Please find the kernel log pictures at:

http://dhiru.kholia.googlepages.com/FreeBSD7-no-ACPIcrash.tar
http://dhiru.kholia.googlepages.com/FreeBSD7nforcecrashACPI.tar

Any help will be greatly appreciated. Do revert back in case you need
more details/logs.

Let nforce get some FreeBSD love!

-- 
dsk

Fix: 

none!
How-To-Repeat: Try installing FreeBSD 7.0 on NVIDIA 650i Ultra mobo.
